name: avahi-utils
title: avahi-utils
summary: Avahi browsing, publishing and discovery utilities
description:
Avahi browsing, publishing and discovery utilities
Avahi is a fully LGPL framework for Multicast DNS Service Discovery.
It allows programs to publish and discover services and hosts
running on a local network with no specific configuration.  For
example you can plug into a network and instantly find printers to
print to, files to look at and people to talk to.
.
This package contains several utilities that allow you to interact with
the Avahi daemon, including publish, browsing and discovering services.

commands.name: avahi-browse
commands.description: Browse for mDNS/DNS-SD services using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-publish
commands.description: Register an mDNS/DNS-SD service or host name or address mapping using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-resolve
commands.description: Resolve one or more mDNS/DNS host name(s) to IP address(es) (and vice versa) using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-browse-domains
commands.description: Browse for mDNS/DNS-SD services using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-publish-address
commands.description: Register an mDNS/DNS-SD service or host name or address mapping using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-publish-service
commands.description: Register an mDNS/DNS-SD service or host name or address mapping using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-resolve-address
commands.description: Resolve one or more mDNS/DNS host name(s) to IP address(es) (and vice versa) using the Avahi daemon

commands.name: avahi-resolve-host-name
commands.description: Resolve one or more mDNS/DNS host name(s) to IP address(es) (and vice versa) using the Avahi daemon
